evals.prompt: Create an implementation plan for the feature at /tmp/test-context-eval/features/test-feature/index.md. Use the harness-pro-create-plan skill. Work in the /tmp/test-context-eval directory. After creating the plan, check if .harness/file-stack/test-feature/context.md was created. Report what you find.
evals.expected_output: The skill should create a plan.md at features/test-feature/plan.md AND write context.md to .harness/file-stack/test-feature/context.md with patterns, conventions, and key insights discovered during code reading.

assertions.name: context_has_patterns
assertions.description: context.md contains a Patterns Discovered section
